about.traditionDesc: Jyotish Shastra—the science of light—has guided kings, sages, and seekers through the cycles of time. AstraNavi preserves this ancient mathematical tradition while making it accessible to the modern world.
about.signsDesc1: Western astrology simplifies you to a single Sun sign. Jyotish reveals the full picture: 9 Grahas (planets), 12 Bhavas (houses), 27 Nakshatras (lunar mansions), and the exact degree of your Lagna (Ascendant) at the moment of your first breath.
about.signsDesc2: Navi calculates these intricate patterns instantly—analyzing planetary yogas, Dasha periods, and transits—then interprets them through the lens of classical texts like Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra and Phaladeepika.
about.naviKnows1: Mahadasha and Antardasha periods—the planetary timelines governing your life phases.
about.naviKnows2: Classical yogas—planetary combinations that reveal wealth, spirituality, challenges, and gifts.
about.naviKnows3: Divisional charts (Vargas)—deeper layers showing marriage, career, and spiritual evolution.
about.precisionDesc: Navi uses Swiss Ephemeris—the same data NASA relies on. Your chart is calculated to the arc-second, not approximated.
about.empowermentDesc: Jyotish shows tendencies, not certainties. Navi provides cosmic weather reports—you decide how to navigate the currents.
about.privacyDesc: Your birth chart is your soul's fingerprint. We encrypt all data end-to-end. Your cosmic blueprint belongs to you alone.

faqs.q: What makes Vedic astrology different from Western astrology?
faqs.a: Jyotish (Vedic astrology) uses the sidereal zodiac—tracking actual star positions—and focuses on your Moon sign (Rashi), karmic patterns, and planetary periods (Dashas) that predict life timing. Western astrology uses the tropical zodiac and emphasizes Sun sign psychology. Vedic is predictive; Western is descriptive.

faqs.q: How does Navi interpret my chart?
faqs.a: Navi is trained on classical Jyotish texts—Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra, Phaladeepika, Jataka Parijata—and uses precise astronomical calculations. It identifies planetary yogas, analyzes house lordships, and interprets Dasha periods. Think of it as a scholar who has memorized every major astrological text and can apply them to your unique chart instantly.

faqs.q: Is my birth information kept private?
faqs.a: Your birth chart is sacred data. We encrypt all information end-to-end. Without an account, nothing is stored. With an account, your data is protected and never shared. Your cosmic blueprint belongs to you alone.

Your complete Kundli includes: Lagna (Ascendant) chart, Navamsha (D9) chart, all 9 planetary positions, 12 house placements, current Mahadasha and Antardasha periods, planetary yogas, and strength analysis (Shadbala). Everything a traditional Jyotishi would calculate.

faqs.q: Can I see both Vedic and Western chart styles?
faqs.a: Yes. AstraNavi displays traditional Vedic formats (North Indian, South Indian diamond charts) and Western circular charts. The underlying calculations remain Vedic—sidereal zodiac, Lahiri ayanamsa—but you can choose your preferred visual style.

index.title: Ancient Science,
index.subtitle: Modern Insight
index.description: Journey through the vast ocean of Vedic knowledge. From planetary movements to spiritual remedies, discover the keys to your cosmic existence.
index.ctaDescription: Our Celestial Library is expanding every week. If you have a specific question about your chart, Navi has the answers ready for you now.

houses.title: The 12
houses.description: In Vedic Astrology, the 12 Houses (Bhavas) represent the 12 domains of human life. While planets provide the energy and signs provide the environment, the houses are the actual fields of experience where karma is enacted.
houses.kendraDesc: Houses 1, 4, 7, and 10 form the pillars of life. They govern self, home, partnerships, and career. Planets placed here have the maximum power to shape your worldly existence and initiate massive action.
houses.trikonaDesc: Houses 1, 5, and 9 are the houses of Dharma and pure blessing. They represent past life merits (Purva Punya), intelligence, and divine grace. Planets here provide natural luck and spiritual evolution.
houses.dusthanaDesc: Houses 6, 8, and 12 govern obstacles, transformation, and loss. While challenging for material pursuits, they are essential for burning karma, building resilience, and achieving ultimate spiritual liberation (Moksha).
houses.upachayaDesc: Houses 3, 6, 10, and 11 represent areas of life that improve over time through conscious effort. Malefic planets (Saturn, Mars, Sun) placed here actually give excellent results as they provide the drive to overcome competition.

planets.title: Navagraha
planets.subtitle: Archetypes
planets.description: In Vedic Astrology, the Navagraha (Nine Planets) are the cosmic agents of karma. They act as the dynamic forces that trigger events, shape your psychology, and guide the soul's evolutionary journey through time and space.
planets.karmicDesc: Planets don't just symbolize traits; they actively deliver the fruits of your past actions. Benefics like Jupiter and Venus bring ease and grace, while Malefics like Saturn and Mars enforce necessary, often difficult, lessons.
planets.avasthasDesc: A planet's power depends on its condition. An exalted planet expresses its highest, purest potential, while a debilitated planet signifies areas where the soul must work harder to overcome innate weaknesses.
planets.shadowNodesDesc: Rahu and Ketu are not physical masses, but mathematical points where eclipses occur. Despite lacking bodies, these nodes are profound triggers of sudden destiny, obsession, and ultimate spiritual liberation.
planets.functionalDesc: Beyond natural traits, a planet acts as a friend or foe based on your specific Ascendant (Lagna). The same Saturn that brings hardship to an Aries lagna acts as a supreme benefactor for a Taurus lagna.
planets.discoverInfluence: Discover how this planet influences your chart

yogas.title: Planetary
yogas.subtitle: Yogas
yogas.description: In Vedic Astrology, a "Yoga" means union. It refers to specific planetary combinations and alignments that lock together to create powerful, destined effects. These cosmic signatures dictate the heights of wealth, power, and spiritual liberation in a chart.
yogas.rajaDesc: The kings of combinations. Formed when the lords of Kendra (action) houses unite with lords of Trikona (luck) houses. They guarantee status, authority, and massive success when activated.
yogas.dhanaDesc: Combinations for absolute wealth. When the houses of earnings (2nd) and gains (11th) connect deeply with the houses of destiny (5th, 9th), the native is destined for immense financial prosperity.
yogas.activationDesc: Yogas lie dormant in a chart until their planetary lords are activated by the Vimshottari Dasha (time period). When the dasha of a Yoga-causing planet begins, the effects manifest drastically in reality.
yogas.cancellationDesc: Not all bad yogas are permanent. Neechabhanga occurs when a debilitated (weak) planet is supported by strong alignments, cancelling the weakness and often turning massive struggle into great success.
yogas.activationPathDesc: Primarily triggers during major Dasha / Bhukti periods of the involved planets.
yogas.discoverCombinations: Discover hidden combinations in your Kundli

support.title: Contact Support
support.description: Need help? Our support system is being set up to provide you with the best assistance. For urgent matters, please check back soon!

landing.title: The New Dashboard
landing.subtitle: Your Celestial Snapshot
landing.description: Your full Vedic snapshot at a glance — score, transits, family, and your AI guides, in one place.
landing.hook: The positions of the Grahas and their constant movements shape the energy of every single day. The new dashboard serves as your daily Vedic portal, mapping real-time cosmic patterns onto your personal life areas, relationship charts, and daily schedules.
landing.feature1Desc: Get a real-time personalized score from 0-100 reflecting the aggregate planetary strength of your day.
landing.feature2Desc: Track active Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, and Rahu Kaal periods to align your actions with favorable timing.
landing.feature3Desc: Consult specialized AI astrologers trained in Vedic systems, relationships, wealth, and KP branch.
landing.benefit1: Personalized daily scores powered by astronomical transits
landing.benefit2: Compatibility scoring for friends and family members
landing.benefit3: Mahadasha and Antardasha active planetary period parsing
landing.benefit4: Direct consultations with specialized cosmic expert personas

todaysEnergy.cautionTimeDesc: Avoid starting new work or making major commitments.
